plan_desc: baseline: separate gate_proj and up_proj, F.silu(gate) * up, then down_proj
expected_fx_pattern: x -> gate_proj; x -> up_proj; gate_proj -> silu; silu + up_proj -> mul; mul -> down_proj

plan_desc: separate gate_proj and up_proj, manual gate * sigmoid(gate) * up, then down_proj
expected_fx_pattern: x -> gate_proj; x -> up_proj; gate_proj -> sigmoid; gate_proj + sigmoid -> mul_silu; mul_silu + up_proj -> mul; mul -> down_proj
semantic_condition: F.silu(gate) is mathematically gate * sigmoid(gate); numerical tolerance must be checked in Day 4

plan_desc: separate gate_proj and up_proj, F.silu(gate), inplace multiply with up, then down_proj
expected_fx_pattern: x -> gate_proj; x -> up_proj; gate_proj -> silu; silu.mul_(up_proj); result -> down_proj
semantic_condition: inplace multiply is valid only if the silu output has no other users

plan_desc: fused gate_up_proj produces 2 * intermediate_dim, chunk into gate/up, F.silu(gate) * up, then down_proj
expected_fx_pattern: x -> gate_up_proj; gate_up_proj -> chunk; chunk[0] -> silu; silu + chunk[1] -> mul; mul -> down_proj
semantic_condition: fused gate_up weight equals concat(gate_proj.weight, up_proj.weight) on output dimension

plan_desc: fused gate_up_proj, torch.split into gate/up, F.silu(gate), inplace multiply with up, then down_proj
expected_fx_pattern: x -> gate_up_proj; gate_up_proj -> split; split[0] -> silu; silu.mul_(split[1]); result -> down_proj
semantic_condition: fused weight concat condition holds; inplace multiply valid only if silu output has no other users

plan_desc: fused gate_up_proj, chunk into gate/up, manual gate * sigmoid(gate) * up, then down_proj
expected_fx_pattern: x -> gate_up_proj; gate_up_proj -> chunk; chunk[0] -> sigmoid; chunk[0] + sigmoid -> mul_silu; mul_silu + chunk[1] -> mul; mul -> down_proj
semantic_condition: fused weight concat condition holds; manual silu numerical tolerance must be checked in Day 4
